headline: Kashkari expects rate hike this year
detail: A Fed president openly calling for hikes shifts rate expectations and directly pressures high-multiple tech names. For your book, this is a headwind for AVGO, PLTR, and CRWD specifically - and it makes your margin costs more expensive the longer it persists.

headline: Micron sinks in volatile week
detail: Micron is a bellwether for the chip cycle, and a sharp drop there signals the sector is under pressure broadly. AVGO and SMH are your direct exposure - watch whether this spread widens or stabilizes before adding or holding.

headline: ON Semi tanks 20% on Synaptics deal
detail: A major chip company losing 20% in a session on deal skepticism is a sector confidence hit. It reinforces that chip names are being punished hard right now, which is the worst backdrop for your already-underwater AVGO position.

headline: Grantham: most expensive US market in history
detail: A high-profile valuation warning adds to the risk-off mood. Overvalued markets unwind fastest in exactly the concentrated, high-multiple tech names you hold - and margin exposure means you feel that faster than most.
